2605.24873.title: Towards a Universal Causal Reasoner
2605.24873.paper_summary: Despite the importance of causal reasoning, training LLMs to reason causally remains underexplored. Existing data efforts mostly focus on benchmarking LLMs on specific aspects of causality, making them less suitable for training generalizable causal reasoners. To address this, we propose UniCo, a data generation framework that both (1) addresses 18 causal query types across Pearl's Causal Ladder and (2) translates natively symbolic examples into code and natural language forms to simulate real-world use cases where causal terms are not explicitly specified. To ensure data quality, UniCo grounds answers with exact causal inference and filters cases with reasoning shortcuts. Upon supervised finetuning with 66.6K UniCo-generated instances, Qwen3-4B, Qwen3-8B and Olmo-3-7B-Instruct achieve an average of 22.9% improvements across all 18 in-distribution query types, and 8.1% over state-of-the-art causal data generation frameworks on 7 established causal benchmarks outside the training distribution. More importantly, in real-world medical understanding, legal decision, and tabular reasoning, UniCo-trained models consistently display more faithful reasoning traces, outperforming the base models by an average of 20.2% in faithfulness metrics. These suggest that causality-centered training not only strengthens causal reasoning, but also equips LLMs with a causal mindset in general reasoning tasks.
2605.24873.paper_summary_zh: 儘管因果推理的重要性，訓練大型語言模型（LLMs）進行因果推理仍然未被充分探索。現有的數據工作主要集中在對LLMs在因果性特定方面的基準測試，使其不太適合訓練可泛化的因果推理者。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了UniCo，一個數據生成框架，該框架同時（1）涵蓋Pearl的因果階梯中的18種因果查詢類型，以及（2）將本土符號示例轉換為代碼和自然語言形式，以模擬現實世界中因果術語未明確指定的用例。為了確保數據質量，UniCo以精確的因果推理為基礎，並過濾掉帶有推理捷徑的案例。在用66.6K UniCo生成的實例進行監督微調後，Qwen3-4B、Qwen3-8B和Olmo-3-7B-Instruct在所有18種內部查詢類型上平均提高了22.9%，並在7個已建立的因果基準上超越了最先進的因果數據生成框架8.1%。更重要的是，在現實世界的醫療理解、法律決策和表格推理中，經UniCo訓練的模型始終顯示出更忠實的推理痕跡，在忠實度指標上平均超越基礎模型20.2%。這些結果表明，以因果性為中心的訓練不僅增強了因果推理，還使LLMs在一般推理任務中具備了因果思維。
2605.24873.author: Qirun Dai et.al.
2605.24873.authors: Qirun Dai, Xiao Liu, Jiawei Zhang, Dylan Zhang, Hao Peng, Chenhao Tan
